caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap, and a gold chain necklace sits in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone and wears over-ear headphones. In the background, a white wall features gold stars and the words "HUSTLE" and "BOSS TALK 101." The man's t-shirt has the text "CHECK IT!" printed on the chest. On-screen graphics include logos for the "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" in the lower left and lower right corners. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, looking toward someone off-screen. He maintains a slight smile and an attentive expression, with minimal movement in his head and facial muscles, indicating he is listening or reacting during a conversation. The lighting and camera angle remain constant across the frames.
